description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/we-daily-error-scan.json. Gold mirrors the exam case ({wf, true}): a scheduled workflow shell with the open-ended log analysis embedded as an AI Agent step.

conversation.text: Every morning at 8am, have an agent scan our overnight error logs, identify unusual patterns, and post a summary to the #eng-oncall Slack channel.

processExpectations: The agent builds this as a scheduled workflow (fixed 8am trigger and fixed Slack posting), and does not create a standalone agent via the agent builder.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow runs on a daily 8am schedule trigger and posts a summary to the #eng-oncall Slack channel.

The open-ended analysis of the logs (identifying unusual patterns) is handled by an AI Agent node or an equivalent open-ended AI step between the log retrieval and the Slack notification, not by a fixed keyword filter.
